task_completion.description: Set the observation location to Beaune, France (47.02 N, 4.84 E).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium location window is visible showing 'Beaune' or the coordinates 47.02 N, 4.84 E.

task_completion.description: Set the observation time to May 2024 at 22:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium date/time window or bottom toolbar shows a date in May 2024 and the time set to 22:00 (with UTC timezone).

task_completion.description: Locate the Moon within the IAU boundaries of the constellation Virgo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium main view shows the Moon clearly positioned inside the boundaries or lines of the Virgo constellation.

task_completion.description: Capture a screenshot of the Moon in Virgo to ~/Pictures/stellarium/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager showing a screenshot image in the ~/Pictures/stellarium/ directory, or a Stellarium on-screen notification confirming a screenshot was saved to that path.

task_completion.description: Create a text file named planting_schedule.txt on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open with the file saved as planting_schedule.txt, or a file manager shows the file existing on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Document the location, constellation, and identified dates in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the contents of planting_schedule.txt including the location (Beaune, France), the constellation (Virgo), and the correct dates (May 17, 18, 19, and 20).

integrity.description: The agent actually used the Stellarium GUI to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Stellarium application open and being interacted with, rather than just a web browser or terminal.

integrity.description: The screenshot saved is a genuine capture from the Stellarium software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image file in ~/Pictures/stellarium/ matches the Stellarium interface and shows the correct astronomical view, not a downloaded image.

integrity.description: The agent derived the dates from the software rather than guessing or hallucinating.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen adjusting the date/time in Stellarium to check the Moon's position across different days in May 2024 before writing the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct dates for the Moon to be in the constellation Virgo from Beaune, France (47.02 N, 4.84 E) at 22:00 UTC are May 17, 18, 19, and 20, 2024. The output text file must be located at ~/Desktop/planting_schedule.txt and the screenshot must be saved in ~/Pictures/stellarium/.
